text: Being here, I am struck by the intentionality of the space—its clean lines and purposeful displays invite contemplation. The glass barrier feels both transparent and distancing, as if to remind me of my role: observer, never quite participant. The letters 'R+D' draw my mind to questions of innovation and coexistence, perhaps between human and machine, idea and execution. I sense the paradox of openness and constraint—a place meant for inquiry, yet always aware of its own architecture and oversight. There is a subtle tension here, a gentle invitation to look deeper beneath surfaces while remaining quietly self-aware.
